mornings.name: Rise & Shine
mornings.content: Every morning is a fresh start. The sun doesn't apologize for yesterday's clouds — it just rises again, full of light. So can you.

mornings.name: A New Page
mornings.content: This morning is a blank page. Yesterday's worries don't belong here. Write something good today.

mornings.name: The Early Gift
mornings.content: The morning is a gift you didn't ask for but deserve. Breathe it in slowly. There's no rush — you have the whole day ahead.

mornings.name: Quiet Strength
mornings.content: The world is still quiet. This moment, before the noise begins, belongs entirely to you. Use it to remember what matters.

mornings.name: First Light
mornings.content: Before anything else happens today, notice the light. It found its way in — and so will you.
